Subject: Inquiry Regarding Digital Resources and Membership Offer

Dear Public Library Staff,

My name is Alex Johnson, and I am writing to formally request access to your digital resource collection, including e-books and academic databases.

I am eager to explore the wealth of knowledge your library offers. To facilitate this, I would appreciate it if you could provide the link to join the membership program. There is typically a promotional offer available for new residents which I believe applies to my account status.

Please let me know if I need to visit the branch in person to finalize the enrollment.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Alex Johnson<|im_end|>

final_answer:
Subject: Inquiry Regarding Digital Resources and Membership Offer

Dear Public Library Staff,

My name is Alex Johnson, and I am writing to formally request access to your digital resource collection, including e-books and academic databases.

I am eager to explore the wealth of knowledge your library offers. To facilitate this, I would appreciate it if you could provide the link to join the membership program. There is typically a promotional offer available for new residents which I believe applies to my account status.

Please let me know if I need to visit the branch in person to finalize the enrollment.

Thank you for your assistance.

Sincerely,

Alex Johnson<|im_end|>
